text:
PC

Cursor trail follows your mouse
Click anywhere spawns expanding rings
Scroll progress bar at the top
Parallax on the hero text when scrolling and moving your mouse
Wordmark glitch animation on hover
Magnetic nav buttons and chips pull toward your cursor
Ripple effect on icon chip clicks
Every word in the About section glows individually on hover
Particle burst when clicking section labels
Tooltips on nav pills

Mobile

Tap ripple on every button, card, chip and link
Shake your phone on the playground to shuffle all cards
Swipe left/right on subject pages to browse between them
Long press subject headings for a hidden fun fact
Tilt button in the playground to enable gyroscope gravity
Cards automatically shrink when tilt activates

Fixes

Gyroscope completely reworked and now actually works on iOS
Gravity physics and float mode both stable
Card collisions fixed
